intro:
Bring cute baby dinosaurs to life with your own colors!
Create your very own dinosaur playground with the Crayon Series.
description:
Meet your child's very first dinosaur friend, Crayon Little Dino!

The latest addition to the beloved Crayon series is finally here! This time, shall we journey back to the mysterious age of dinosaurs? From the mighty T-Rex to the gentle Triceratops, adorable baby dinosaurs are waiting for your child’s warm and creative touch.

■ Game Features

A Living Dinosaur Encyclopedia: Let your child color 16 different species of dinosaurs in their own unique style. Once finished, the dinosaurs come to life with charming, vivid reactions.

A World of Artistic Tools: With a variety of tools like crayons, brushes, and magic sprays, children can let their imaginations run wild without limits.

Stress-Free Play: There are no set rules or time limits. The game is thoughtfully designed to let children explore at their own pace and feel a wonderful sense of achievement.

Perfectly Optimized for Nintendo Switch™: Enjoy together as a family use the touchscreen in Handheld Mode for a delicate coloring experience that feels just like drawing on real paper.

■ Why Crayon Little Dino is Special
The intuitive UI of the Crayon series, proven across many titles, allows even children who cannot yet read to enjoy the game all by themselves. More than just a game, it is a wonderful educational companion that nurtures your child’s sense of color and focus.
